summary: Reviewed the new handoff documentation and process_change issue template. Overall direction is correct, but a few inconsistencies need correction to align with the handoff standard and canonical role/ status rules.
completed_work: Reviewed workflows/handoff_standard.md changes for consistency with the standard and rules
Reviewed .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/process_change.md for alignment with allowed statuses and roles
Identified specific inconsistencies and a likely dead link to handoff_checklist.md
artifacts_updated: No repository artifacts updated in this stage
decision_or_outcome: Approve the minimal approach and locations of changes (standard doc + issue template)
Require alignment of all status enumerations to include: ready for next stage, blocked, requires revision, completed
Require use of canonical role IDs in examples to avoid confusion and remove non-canonical roles from examples
Flag likely dead link to ./handoff_checklist.md; replace or remove to prevent broken references
next_required_action: Apply the following precise doc corrections: 1) In workflows/handoff_standard.md under `# Handoff Template`, change the Status line to: `ready for next stage | blocked | requires revision | completed`. 2) In workflows/handoff_standard.md under `### Next Owner`, replace the example roles list with canonical role IDs: product_manager, project_manager, technical_architect, software_engineer, qa_analyst. 3) In workflows/handoff_standard.md, fix the header `##Handoff` to `## Handoff` (add missing space). 4) In workflows/handoff_standard.md, remove or replace the broken link `Template: [Handoff Checklist](./handoff_checklist.md)` with a reference to the "Agent Handoff Payload Checklist" section. 5) In .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/process_change.md, update the `status:` hint to include `requires revision` so it reads: `<ready for next stage | blocked | requires revision | completed>`.
blockers_or_risks: handoff_standard.md references a likely missing ./handoff_checklist.md file, which can mislead contributors if not fixed
Non-canonical role example (Founder) in the Next Owner list may cause invalid next_owner values in handoffs if copied verbatim

implementation_plan.goal: Align handoff docs and template with canonical statuses and roles; remove dead link to prevent confusion.
implementation_plan.issue_body: Make small, surgical documentation edits to ensure full consistency with the Workflow Handoff Standard and eliminate a broken link.
recommended_first_changes: Update status enumeration in the Handoff Template to include completed
Replace Next Owner example list with canonical role IDs
Remove or replace the broken handoff_checklist.md link
Add `requires revision` to the status hint in the process_change issue template
notes: Keep edits minimal and do not expand scope beyond these consistency fixes

handoff.next_required_action: Implement the five targeted documentation corrections listed in next_required_action.
